'''âch-w-y-zh''' ('''kachawyezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valvulate|valvulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valvulate|valvulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-w-y-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachawyezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichawyezhoko|thichawyezhoko]] || [[word:jichawyezhoko|jichawyezhoko]] || [[word:shichawyezhoko|shichawyezhoko]] || [[word:kichawyezhoko|kichawyezhoko]]
